explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Documentation mentions the bank's use of AI to prevent past issues, implying a decision-making framework for AI application. It also references the use of algorithms and feedback loops for learning. Furthermore, a privacy statement mentions "AI investments," indicating discussion of the bank's AI strategy and resource allocation.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This article from Risk.net provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports governance by mentioning the bank's use of AI to prevent past issues, implying a decision-making framework for AI application. The source also supports transparency by describing the AI's function in monitoring customer behavior and sentiment, indicating operational deployment and openness about its purpose.
relevant_sources.title: First Citizens Used AI to Retain SVB Customers (Risk.net)

relevant_sources.summary: This Pega RPA case study for First Citizens Bank provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. The document describes the bank's use of AI and ML capabilities, including NLP and decisioning, for document processing and customer service workflows. This supports transparency by detailing the AI's application in automation and data processing, and governance by mentioning the use of algorithms and feedback loops for learning.
relevant_sources.title: First Citizens Bank Pega RPA Case Study

relevant_sources.summary: The First Citizens Bank Privacy Statement, a company-owned privacy policy, provides evidence for the **governance** pillar. This is because the document mentions "AI investments," indicating that the bank is discussing its AI strategy and resource allocation, which are key components of responsible AI governance.
relevant_sources.title: First Citizens Bank Privacy Statement

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: The bank's documentation describes the AI's function in monitoring customer behavior and sentiment, indicating operational deployment and openness about its purpose. It also details the AI's application in automation and data processing, specifically mentioning the use of AI and ML capabilities, including NLP and decisioning, for document processing and customer service workflows.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: This article from Risk.net provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports governance by mentioning the bank's use of AI to prevent past issues, implying a decision-making framework for AI application. The source also supports transparency by describing the AI's function in monitoring customer behavior and sentiment, indicating operational deployment and openness about its purpose.
relevant_sources.title: First Citizens Used AI to Retain SVB Customers (Risk.net)

relevant_sources.summary: This Pega RPA case study for First Citizens Bank provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. The document describes the bank's use of AI and ML capabilities, including NLP and decisioning, for document processing and customer service workflows. This supports transparency by detailing the AI's application in automation and data processing, and governance by mentioning the use of algorithms and feedback loops for learning.
relevant_sources.title: First Citizens Bank Pega RPA Case Study

summary.overall_findings: First Citizens BancShares' public disclosures describe the AI's function in monitoring customer behavior and sentiment, indicating operational deployment and openness about the AI's purpose within the transparency pillar. Additionally, published materials mention the bank's use of AI to prevent past issues and imply a decision-making framework for AI application under the governance pillar. These two areas represent the documented evidence for 2 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Based on a review of 9 publicly available sources, no qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
